meta.question: Which parent requirements trace down to the APS Interface Requirements?
meta.finalAnswer: No matching parent requirements were found that trace down to the APS Interface Requirements. It is possible that the requirement tracing relationships are not explicitly modeled as dependencies between TMT requirements in this dataset.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Interface Requirements")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: No exact match for 'APS Interface Requirements'. Trying a broader search for 'APS' to find relevant requirements.

request.reason: Found many APS-related elements, but not 'APS Interface Requirements'. Searching for 'Interface' within the APS package hierarchy to find the correct requirement element.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("interface")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("aps")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the package 'APS Interface Requirements'. Now I need to find the requirements inside this package and their parent requirements via dependency relationships (e.g., 'refine' or 'satisfy'). Mapping properties of the package first.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Interface Requirements" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Interface Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?parentReq ?parentName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Interface Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  
  # Look for dependencies where the requirement is the client (tracing down)
  # or supplier (tracing up). The user asked for "parent requirements trace down to",
  # which usually means the parent is the supplier and the child is the client.
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req ;
       vocab:Dependency_supplier ?parentReq .
  ?parentReq rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement ;
             vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?parentReq ?parentName ?depType WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Interface Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  
  # Check for any dependency relationship
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req ;
       vocab:Dependency_supplier ?parentReq .
  ?parentReq rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement ;
             vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
  ?dep rdf:type ?depType .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?parentReq ?parentName WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("aps")))
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  
  # Try to find dependencies where the requirement is the client
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req ;
       vocab:Dependency_supplier ?parentReq .
  ?parentReq rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement ;
             vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?parentReq ?parentName ?depType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("aps")))
  
  # Check for any dependency relationship
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?req ;
       vocab:Dependency_client ?parentReq .
  ?parentReq rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement ;
             vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
  ?dep rdf:type ?depType .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Despite extensive searching for requirements and their dependencies within the 'APS Interface Requirements' package, no direct parent-child requirement traces were found. It is possible the model structure for requirements tracing is different or the data is not present. Finalizing with no matching data.

request.answer: No matching parent requirements were found that trace down to the APS Interface Requirements. It is possible that the requirement tracing relationships are not explicitly modeled as dependencies between TMT requirements in this dataset.
